content.en:
"Curse the Blackstone too quickly!"

Ye Tian frowned.

Although the three chains of shackles were broken, the cursed blackstone was almost exhausted, and the remaining cursed blackstone could not continue to break the fourth shackle chain.

Right now, no one else would necessarily continue to trade Cursed Blackstone with him, so he had to find a way to collect some Cursed Blackstone.

And the place where the cursed blackstone is currently found the most is the blackstone domain at the end of the realm, but it is very dangerous here, and it is one of the forbidden areas.

For example, last time, the master of the Xuantu was contaminated with the inexplicable black qi in the Black Stone Domain, causing the body of control to collapse, if he hadn't saved the master of the Xuantu, then the master of the Xuantu would have died.

Of course, it's not just because of the black gas, there are other dangers.

In short, many times, if you are not careful, you will fall in the Blackstone Domain.

But even so, there are still many controllers who have gone to the Blackstone Domain this time, of course, they are all those who have mastered the Will-incarnation Realm and have the eternal controllers of the Will Clone.

Even if it encounters danger, at most it will be the fall of the will doppelganger, although the loss will be great, but it is better than falling yourself.

"Then go to the Blackstone Domain, at least there are still a lot of cursed blackstones in the Blackstone Domain, and if you're lucky, you can still find a lot of cursed blackstones!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

this day.

Ye Tian went to the Black Stone Domain, of course, he was directly connected to the Northern Wilderness River from Taichu Mountain, and went directly to the Black Stone Domain, so that it was closer.

Moreover, the Beihuang River has also calmed down recently, and there will be no major danger.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the Beihuang River, and then went to the Black Stone Domain through the Beihuang River.

Soon after, the Blackstone Domain arrived!

After coming to the Black Stone Domain, Ye Tian sensed that the boundless black aura permeated the entire Black Stone Domain.

Of course, this black aura that permeates the entire Blackstone Domain is naturally not the kind of black aura that makes the body controlled by the Xuantu Controller collapse, otherwise who would dare to enter the Blackstone Domain!

However, these black auras will still suppress the Eternal Master, interfere with the perception of the will, and so on.

Ye Tian didn't hesitate and stepped directly into the Black Stone Domain.

All around, a dense black aura enveloped him, and he blocked it.

The Black Stone Domain is very large, and the area shrouded in black aura can be called the Black Stone Domain, and the cursed black stones here are scattered everywhere, and there seems to be no pattern.

Moreover, there is the interference of black aura, which causes many Eternal Masters to not be aware of the existence of the cursed black stone at all, plus this place is very dangerous, and if you are not careful, you will encounter mortal danger.

As a result, the Eternal Masters entered the Blackstone Domain, and they did not dare to travel through time and space, nor did they dare to fly too fast, and the speed of searching for the cursed Blackstone would be very slow.

So, for so long, although many Eternal Masters have come here, they haven't found many cursed blackstones.

Ye Tian flew slowly here for a long time, and he didn't find any signs of life.

"It's a pity, if this place is like the Tianhu Sea, there are some life, and I like to stay by the cursed black stone, then it would be good!"

Ye Tian thought.

If that were the case, he could easily find the Cursed Blackstone.

However, this did not happen.

He wanted to find the cursed blackstone, and he couldn't rely on copying talent.

"Let's take our time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to search for cursed black stones, although there was no big harvest at first, only occasionally obtained one or two cursed black stones.

However, he did not encounter any major dangers.

If it is safe like this, it will be possible to obtain some cursed blackstones for a long time, and the harvest will not be too small.

That's why so many Eternal Masters are willing to venture here.

As long as you don't die, you will gain a lot.

......

this day.

Ye Tian came to an area of the Black Stone Domain, which was a mountain range suspended in the void, and when Ye Tian entered this mountain range, he sensed some cursed black stones.

So, he was excited and immediately tore the mountain range, preparing to take the cursed black stone inside.

But suddenly, a few wisps of black aura entered Ye Tian's body.

"It's not good, it's the kind of black aura that makes the body of the Xuantu controller collapse!!"

Ye Tian's expression changed greatly.

For this kind of aura, he still remembered his horror, even the body of the Eight Realm-level controllers could not bear it, if it was not a life-saving thing, it would soon collapse.

Of course, he didn't try it with his body, but it is estimated that even the Nine Realms level controller can't bear it, because this kind of aura directly collapses the body of control, and it may not have much to do with strength, it is directly to disintegrate the body of control!

"Hey, I seem to be able to handle it!"

Ye Tian suddenly found that the speed at which his controlled body collapsed was very slow, and he could still bear it.

Soon, he knew why.

His physique is special!

He has devoured the three lives of the Black Silent Sea, the Devouring Mountain, and the Ten Thousand Phase Lin Dragon, so his physique is very strong, and the Devouring Mountain physique can absorb energy and neutralize external attacks.

Therefore, it was not a simple matter for these special black aura to collapse his physical body.

That's why he can bear it!

Of course.

It's just that you can bear it, but if you don't solve it, there will still be problems.

Subconsciously, Ye Tian wanted to go back, and then find a black sea to lure these wisps of breath out.

But at this time, he discovered a problem.

"These wisps of aura directly invaded the root of the primordial mastery body, where it seemed to be the location of the shackles and chains. Before, the cursed black stone and the life white stone together could reveal the shackles and chains from the root, otherwise even the Ten Realms-level controllers would not be able to find the location of the shackles and chains. And these wisps of breath can also silently infiltrate the root of the primordial-level control body, if it is combined with the Life White Stone, will it also make the shackles and chains manifest?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

If he could, then he could completely use these few wisps of special black aura to ban the cursed black stone!

"Try it, it's just a big deal to lose a replica body!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Thereupon.

He took out some life white stones and began to try.

Soon, the Life White Stone was absorbed by him, entered the root place, and merged with those few wisps of black aura.

Rumble!!!

The changes were made, and the shackles and chains at the root of the primordial control body in the body were manifested.

"Success!!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

And.

What surprised him even more was that these few wisps of black aura not only caused the primordial-level control body to collapse, but even the shackles and chains were affected by these wisps of black aura and became loose.

This means that it is easier for Ye Tian to break this shackle chain.

"Hahaha, a big discovery, I thought these special black breaths were terrifying things, but I didn't expect them to be things of great chance!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Now, he can rest assured, there will be no shortage of cursed black stones in the future!
